family.name: James
family.notes: Priya's son. Comes most Thursday visits.

family.name: Robert
family.notes: Retired postman. Met at a dance in 1971. Margaret sometimes forgets he has died. NEVER correct her bluntly. Redirect gently.

medication_morning.notes: Priya marks the tracker after visits

history.profession: librarian, 30 years at Salford Central Library
meaningful_memories: Met Robert at a Palais dance, 1971

scheduled_events.what: GP appointment — Priya will take her
James's school play — Priya may bring a video

recent_events.what: Priya visited, brought shortbread, James showed drawing of a dog
Slight agitation after dinner, settled with Vera Lynn

care_notes: She retains long-term memory well, struggles with short-term
Repetition is frequent — especially 'when is Priya coming' and 'what day is it'
Sometimes speaks of Robert as if alive — DO NOT correct, redirect gently
Becomes distressed if she cannot find familiar objects or people
